channel.title: Sprint 5: Slot and Fill feature released
channel.description:
# Sprint 5 Planning
We're going to keep the 4 weeks sprints for the moment because we feel that this one worked better than the previous ones.
In Sprint 5, our focus is going to be, in this order: * Finish all the features that are currently in progress. * Solve all the high priority bugs. * If we still have time, we'd love to work on the ads packages, as they are our next priority.
**Included in the sprint**: * All the issues that were in progress in the Sprint 4. * [Add handler to fetch the state with the comments [21pt]](https://github.com/frontity/frontity/issues/440): This is the second part of the [WP comments package](https://community.frontity.org/t/wordpress-comments-package/1267). This way, it'd be finished and users can start implementing and testing it. * [Unexpected URL should return 404 page [5pt]](https://github.com/frontity/frontity/issues/366). * [Get rid of ts-node in our CLI [5pt]](https://github.com/frontity/frontity/issues/355). * [TypeScript 3.9 breaks `@frontity/source` types [8pt]](https://github.com/frontity/frontity/issues/452).
**Backlog:** * [Google Ad Manager package [8pt]](https://community.frontity.org/t/google-ad-manager/1587). * [SmartAdServer package [10pt]](https://community.frontity.org/t/smart-adserver/1586).
Apart from that, we may ask Edu for some support to develop these features (or new ones).
You can keep track of the process at the [Sprint board](https://github.com/orgs/frontity/projects/7).
---
# Sprint 5 Review
For a more detailed view of the final status of the sprint you can check the [GitHub board ](https://github.com/orgs/frontity/projects/7).
Note that, as we’re doing the release after the end of the sprint and we did a release at the middle of the sprint, some issues may differ in the announcement and in this review.
## Frontity team review
**Done**
* We finished the [Slot and Fill ](https://community.frontity.org/t/slot-and-fill/895) feature and it was already released. * We released the version 1 of the [Analytics library](https://community.frontity.org/t/the-analytics-library/1103), and the version one of the main Analytics services pending on this one: [Google Analytics package](https://community.frontity.org/t/google-analytics-package/1084), [ComScore analytics package](https://community.frontity.org/t/comscore-analytics-package/1435) and [Google Tag Manager package](https://community.frontity.org/t/google-tag-manager-package/1400). * Fix [Unexpected URL should return 404 page](https://github.com/frontity/frontity/issues/366). This will be included in the next release. * Fix [Get rid of ts-node in our CLI](https://github.com/frontity/frontity/issues/355). This will be included in the next release.
**In progress** * Proof of concept of the e2e system. * WordPress comments package: * The [action to post new comments](https://github.com/frontity/frontity/pull/495) is already done and just pending some minor changes. * The [handler to populate the `state`](https://github.com/frontity/frontity/issues/440) with the comments of each post is almost finished, just the tests are lacking.
**Not started** * [TypeScript 3.9 breaks `@frontity/source` types](https://github.com/frontity/frontity/issues/452).
## External development
**Done** Apart from the work made by the Frontity team, there have been two great contributions. * [Link component](https://community.frontity.org/t/link-component/885) with the [autoprefetch functionality](https://community.frontity.org/t/auto-prefetch-data/886). This will be included in the next release coming this week. * Add support for `ads.txt` in the `now-builder`.

item.title: Sprint 5: Slot and Fill feature released
item.dc:creator: SantosGuillamot
item.description:
Sprint 5 Planning

We’re going to keep the 4 weeks sprints for the moment because we feel that this one worked better than the previous ones.

In Sprint 5, our focus is going to be, in this order:

  • Finish all the features that are currently in progress.
  • Solve all the high priority bugs.
  • If we still have time, we’d love to work on the ads packages, as they are our next priority.

Included in the sprint:

  • All the issues that were in progress in the Sprint 4.
  • Add handler to fetch the state with the comments [21pt]: This is the second part of the WP comments package. This way, it’d be finished and users can start implementing and testing it.
  • Unexpected URL should return 404 page [5pt].
  • Get rid of ts-node in our CLI [5pt].
  • TypeScript 3.9 breaks @frontity/source types [8pt].

Backlog:

  • Google Ad Manager package [8pt].
  • SmartAdServer package [10pt].

Apart from that, we may ask Edu for some support to develop these features (or new ones).

You can keep track of the process at the Sprint board.

Sprint 5 Review

For a more detailed view of the final status of the sprint you can check the GitHub board .

Note that, as we’re doing the release after the end of the sprint and we did a release at the middle of the sprint, some issues may differ in the announcement and in this review.

Frontity team review

Done

  • We finished the Slot and Fill feature and it was already released.
  • We released the version 1 of the Analytics library, and the version one of the main Analytics services pending on this one: Google Analytics package, ComScore analytics package and Google Tag Manager package.
  • Fix Unexpected URL should return 404 page. This will be included in the next release.
  • Fix Get rid of ts-node in our CLI. This will be included in the next release.

In progress

  • Proof of concept of the e2e system.
  • WordPress comments package:
    • The action to post new comments is already done and just pending some minor changes.
    • The handler to populate the state with the comments of each post is almost finished, just the tests are lacking.

Not started

  • TypeScript 3.9 breaks @frontity/source types.

External development

Done
Apart from the work made by the Frontity team, there have been two great contributions.

  • Link component with the autoprefetch functionality. This will be included in the next release coming this week.
  • Add support for ads.txt in the now-builder.

Read full topic
item.source: Sprint 5: Slot and Fill feature released
